mapper.insert: INSERT INTO orders (trader_id, base_asset_id, quote_asset_id, order_type, side, price, total_qty, filled_qty, status) VALUES (#{traderId}, #{baseAssetId}, #{quoteAssetId}, #{type}, #{side}, #{price}, #{totalQty}, #{filledQty}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE orders SET filled_qty = #{filledQty}, status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
